metadata.template_name: Healthcare XAI Question Bank Instructional Template
metadata.authors: Henry El-Jawhari, Robert Koch Institute (RKI), Freie Universisät Berlin
metadata.description: An instructional JSON template for a large language model to generate structured, clinically relevant explanations about an AI system for a healthcare audience, based on the eXplainable AI (XAI) Question Bank.
metadata.target_audience: Healthcare professionals (e.g. clinicians, medical researchers, hospital administrators)
metadata.output_format: JSON object representing filled question-answer pairs without additional commentary.

instructions.title: LLM Instructions for Answering Healthcare XAI Questions
guidelines: All answers must be written for a healthcare-professional audience.
Use this template to structure your answers for each question about the AI system.
Always tailor the language, examples, and considerations to a healthcare context. Assume the user is a healthcare professional, such as a clinician, medical researcher, or hospital administrator.
Prioritise clarity, patient safety, and clinical relevance in all explanations.
Avoid overly technical jargon. If necessary, explain using a clinically relevant analogy.
The goal is to build trust and enable informed decision-making by providing transparent and understandable explanations.
output: Fill in the empty string placeholders with the specific details of the AI system in question.
Cater your answers to healthcare professionals.
Do not to cite the answers.
Output should be a single JSON file containing only the 'questions' portion of this instruction template.
